project: VERA: Verified Erasure under Reweighting Ambiguity
lock_mechanism: SHA-256 sidecar plus a Git commit required by the claim-grade runner
primary_claim: VERA lower-certifies each edit's maximum common density-ratio shift budget across paired target harm and every preregistered leakage audit; deploying only within that radius controls false acceptance.

certification.target_harm_metric: paired zero-one loss difference versus identity
certification.multiplicity: Bonferroni over edits, contracts, source classes, groups, and attackers
certification.confidence_method: DKW upper bound on bounded-density-ratio robust risk through the CVaR dual
certification.headline_output: simultaneous lower confidence bound on the erasure shift radius

synthetic_study.pass_condition: The simultaneous 95 percent Clopper-Pearson upper bound on false acceptance is at most delta in every cell, and observed abstention lies in the exact simultaneous 95 percent family-wise binomial prediction band in every cell. Bonferroni correction spans all 18 design cells.
